title: The Gingerbread House
description: Adds a gingerbread house randomly generating in the world, could contain loot !!!
body:
![banner](https://i.imgur.com/BOc314z.png)

## About the Mod

The Gingerbread House Mod brings a touch of magic and whimsy to your Minecraft world by adding charming, fully furnished gingerbread houses that spawn naturally in snowy and forest biomes. Each house is carefully designed with candy cane pillars, chocolate roofs, gingerbread walls, and colorful decorations, creating a cozy, storybook-like atmosphere that feels like stepping into a festive fairytale. Inside these delightful homes, players can discover a variety of unique loot, including candy canes, gingerbread cookies, decorative ornaments, and other rare surprises. Some houses even hide secret rooms or special items, rewarding players who take the time to explore every corner. The whimsical interiors are packed with fun furniture and decorative items, making each house feel lived-in and full of character. Perfect for players who want to add holiday cheer, cozy living spaces, or magical structures to their worlds, this mod enhances exploration and brings life to snowy landscapes and forested areas. Whether you are looking to create a festive village, decorate your world for the holidays, or simply stumble upon a sweet surprise while adventuring, the Gingerbread House Mod offers endless charm, discovery, and playful fun. [![Support Me on Ko-fi](https://cdn.prod.website-files.com/5c14e387dab576fe667689cf/670f5a0171bfb928b21a7e00_support_me_on_kofi_beige.png)](https://ko-fi.com/nightbeamstudio) --- ## Media

--- ## Features

- **Natural Spawns:** Gingerbread houses appear in **Snowy and Forest biomes**, adding charm to your world. - **Whimsical Interiors:** Fully furnished with candy-themed furniture and decorations. - **Special Loot:** Includes candy canes, gingerbread cookies, rare decorations, and other collectibles. - **Exploration:** Perfect for players who love surprises and festive adventures.

--- ## Installation

**Supported Minecraft Versions:** 1.16.5 | 1.17.1 | 1.18.2 | 1.19.2 | 1.19.4 | 1.20.1 | 1.20.4 | 1.20.6 | 1.21.1 | 1.21.4 | 1.21.5 | 1.21.8 **Supported Platforms:** NeoForge, Forge, Fabric
